acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.title: Mercosur – European Union Agreement
acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.intro: A data feature that translates the impact of the Mercosur–European Union trade agreement for the industry of Alagoas.
acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.challenge: Explaining a complex, number-heavy agreement to a broad audience without losing technical rigour.
acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.approach: I structured the narrative into visual blocks — affected sectors, opportunities and risks — with charts that guide the reading from top to bottom.
acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.captionOne: Every section opens with an anchor figure and unfolds the context right below it.
acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.captionTwo: Charts and maps take the lead; the copy guides instead of competing.
acordo-mercosul-uniao-europeia.websiteNote: A navigable feature that turns an international agreement into a clear read for the productive sector.

testimonial.quote: The feature gave visual shape to a dry subject and became reference material in our conversations with the sector.
testimonial.author: Communications Board

app-tempo-previsto.title: Tempo Previsto App
app-tempo-previsto.intro: A weather app built around clarity: the right information, at the right moment, with no noise.
app-tempo-previsto.challenge: Weather apps pile up data and clutter the screen; hierarchy and quick reading were missing.
app-tempo-previsto.approach: I designed a home screen that answers "what it is like now and what comes next" in seconds, with details on demand.
app-tempo-previsto.captionOne: The immediate forecast owns the top; the timeline deepens as you scroll.
app-tempo-previsto.captionTwo: Large icons and type keep it readable at a glance, even on the move.
app-tempo-previsto.websiteNote: A weather app that puts the user's decision — umbrella or no umbrella — above everything else.

testimonial.quote: Finally a weather app I open and understand right away.
testimonial.author: Beta user

boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.title: Visão Alagoas Economic Bulletin
boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.intro: The digital edition of the state's economic bulletin, trading a static PDF for living, navigable indicators.
boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.challenge: Moving a dense report to the web without losing depth or pushing the reader away.
boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.approach: I broke the bulletin into sections with key indicators up front and interactive charts by theme.
boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.captionOne: Each indicator carries the number, the change and the context in a single read.
boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.captionTwo: Historical series gain charts that respond to touch.
boletim-economico-visao-alagoas.websiteNote: An economic bulletin that stopped being a file and became a panel for continuous reference.

testimonial.quote: The bulletin came alive on the web and is now consulted all month long, not only at launch.
testimonial.author: Economics Unit

combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.title: Fighting Deforestation in Alagoas
combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.intro: A feature that crosses MapBiomas data on deforestation and fire in Alagoas into a clear territorial read.
combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.challenge: Making an abstract environmental subject tangible, with heaps of geographic and time-series data.
combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.approach: Maps and time series tell how deforestation evolved by region, with filters by period.
combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.captionOne: The map is the centre of the narrative; the numbers confirm what the eyes already see.
combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.captionTwo: The timeline reveals progress and setbacks, year by year.
combate-ao-desmatamento-em-alagoas-desma.websiteNote: MapBiomas data turned into a territorial story about deforestation and fire.

testimonial.quote: We managed to show the problem on the map, and that changed the weight of the conversation.
testimonial.author: Sustainability Unit

conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.title: Connecting the Future: ESG in Industry
conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.intro: A landing page that presents the ESG agenda of the industry in Alagoas and invites engagement.
conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.challenge: Communicating a dense institutional subject (ESG) in an inspiring, accessible way.
conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.approach: I structured the page around the pillars — environmental, social and governance — with a visual path that leads to action.
conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.captionOne: Each ESG pillar gets its own visual block and call to action.
conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.captionTwo: Subtle animation reinforces the idea of progress and future.
conectandoofuturo-avancandocom-esgnaindu.websiteNote: A landing page that turns the industry's ESG strategy into a story about the future.

testimonial.quote: The page gave our ESG agenda the modern face it needed.
testimonial.author: ESG Unit

ecommerce-pai-eterno.title: Pai Eterno E-commerce
ecommerce-pai-eterno.intro: A devotional online store designed for a broad audience with little experience buying online.
ecommerce-pai-eterno.challenge: Every decision started from one question: could my grandmother buy this on her own?
ecommerce-pai-eterno.approach: I reduced the journey to the essentials, with clear steps, generous type and the brand's blue-and-gold identity.
ecommerce-pai-eterno.captionOne: One decision per screen, with the primary button always in sight.
ecommerce-pai-eterno.captionTwo: Gold appears only at meaningful moments — seals and confirmation.
ecommerce-pai-eterno.websiteNote: A devotional store where solemnity and simplicity walk together.

testimonial.quote: Customers of every age started buying on their own, without asking for help.
testimonial.author: E-commerce Management

economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.title: The Ocean Economy in Alagoas
economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.intro: A feature about the potential of the ocean economy for Alagoas, from ports to tourism.
economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.challenge: Bringing scattered sectors — fishing, ports, tourism and energy — into a single narrative.
economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.approach: I organised the content by value chain, with data and imagery that give scale to the maritime potential.
economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.captionOne: Each sector of the blue economy gets its own slice of data.
economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.captionTwo: Photography and numbers alternate to make the subject concrete.
economia-do-mar-em-alagoas.websiteNote: A navigable overview of the economic potential of the Alagoas coast.

testimonial.quote: The feature set the agenda for a subject that was being underused.
testimonial.author: Economics Unit

meu-primeiro-portfolio.title: My First Portfolio
meu-primeiro-portfolio.intro: The portfolio that marked my first steps as a designer and front-end developer.
meu-primeiro-portfolio.challenge: Translating my identity into a website while I was still learning the craft.
meu-primeiro-portfolio.approach: I went for a clean layout and interface experiments that became my training ground.
meu-primeiro-portfolio.captionOne: Every section was an excuse to learn something new in CSS.
meu-primeiro-portfolio.captionTwo: Simplicity out of necessity — and out of taste.
meu-primeiro-portfolio.websiteNote: The starting point: a portfolio documenting the beginning of the journey.

testimonial.quote: This is where I found out I wanted to make a living building interfaces.
testimonial.author: John Amorim

miau-dote.title: MiauDote
miau-dote.intro: An app that brings pets in need of a home closer to people willing to adopt — or to rehome responsibly.
miau-dote.challenge: Making responsible adoption simple and warm, without paperwork that discourages people.
miau-dote.approach: I designed a light discovery-and-contact flow, with the animal's profile and location at the centre of the experience.
miau-dote.captionOne: Adopt or rehome: two clear doors on the very first screen.
miau-dote.captionTwo: Every profile carries temperament, location and availability status.
miau-dote.websiteNote: Pet adoption with less friction and more affection, from discovery to home.

testimonial.quote: A cute and serious way, at once, to solve a real problem.
testimonial.author: Volunteer

minha-primeira-landing-page.title: My First Landing Page
minha-primeira-landing-page.intro: The exercise that taught me to build a landing page from scratch, from layout to deploy.
minha-primeira-landing-page.challenge: Getting out of the tutorial and shipping something published, responsive and working.
minha-primeira-landing-page.approach: I focused on a classic conversion structure and on getting spacing, rhythm and responsiveness right.
minha-primeira-landing-page.captionOne: One fold to introduce, one to convince, one to invite.
minha-primeira-landing-page.captionTwo: Every margin tweak was a hands-on lesson.
minha-primeira-landing-page.websiteNote: The first landing page I published — small in scope, big in learning.

testimonial.quote: Simple, but this is where the fundamentals finally clicked.
testimonial.author: John Amorim

paineis-gerencias.title: Management Dashboards
paineis-gerencias.intro: Rebuilding access to management dashboards on top of a lean design system.
paineis-gerencias.challenge: Screens inherited over years, with no hierarchy and no consistency across modules.
paineis-gerencias.approach: I defined tokens and base components before the screens; every dashboard now assembles like Lego.
paineis-gerencias.captionOne: Everything clickable is blue; nothing that isn't, is.
paineis-gerencias.captionTwo: Session and permission states stay visible, but discreet.
paineis-gerencias.websiteNote: A coherent internal system where every new module is born finished.

testimonial.quote: The teams stopped relearning every screen.
testimonial.author: Product Leadership

pape-ia.title: PapeIA
pape-ia.intro: An AI-powered support platform that brings channels, agents and conversations into a single flow.
pape-ia.challenge: Empowering automation without hiding the human — and without turning the screen into an intimidating cockpit.
pape-ia.approach: I designed an inbox with AI agents side by side: pause, reply and tag at the pace of the conversation.
pape-ia.captionOne: Channels, tags and status sit on the left; the conversation owns the centre.
pape-ia.captionTwo: The agent can be paused at any time — a human takes over in one click.
pape-ia.websiteNote: Customer support and relationships powered by AI, without losing the human touch.

testimonial.quote: The agents handle the repetitive work; the team is left with what matters.
testimonial.author: Beta user

plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.title: Integrated Unit Management Platform
plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.intro: A platform that brings the management of multiple units together in one place.
plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.challenge: Data and routines scattered across units, each one with its own way of working.
plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.approach: I centralised indicators and processes into a shared view, with a deep dive per unit.
plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.captionOne: The overview shows the network; a click goes deep into each unit.
plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.captionTwo: Shared standards make sure every unit speaks the same language.
plataforma-integradade-gestaodas-unidade.websiteNote: Integrated management that trades scattered spreadsheets for a single view.

testimonial.quote: We now see every unit through the same standard.
testimonial.author: Operations Management

plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.title: Smart Pedagogical Intervention Platform
plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.intro: A dashboard that helps managers answer, in seconds, which schools need attention right now.
plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.challenge: Education data scattered across spreadsheets and isolated systems.
plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.approach: I consolidated everything into risk indicators with colour semantics that stay consistent from the first chart to the last.
plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.captionOne: Schools at risk rise to the top; the priority becomes obvious.
plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.captionTwo: Every state carries an icon and a label beyond colour — readable by everyone.
plataformade-intervencoes-pedagogicas-in.websiteNote: Data-driven pedagogical intervention, prioritising whoever needs it most.

testimonial.quote: We look at the whole network and know where to act first.
testimonial.author: Pedagogical Coordination

the-be-social.title: The Be Social
the-be-social.intro: The website of a social media agency that needed to look as creative as the work it delivers.
the-be-social.challenge: Translating energy and creativity without falling into the agency cliché.
the-be-social.approach: I went for a bold layout, dynamic rhythm and featured cases that prove the value right away.
the-be-social.captionOne: The cases open the conversation; the pitch comes later.
the-be-social.captionTwo: Movement and contrast set the brand's creative tone.
the-be-social.websiteNote: An agency site that shows, before telling, what it is capable of.

testimonial.quote: The site finally looks like us — and it converts.
testimonial.author: Founding Partner

panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.title: Electricity and Energy Mix Overview
panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.intro: A visual overview of the electricity and energy mixes, from sources to consumption.
panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.challenge: Telling the electricity mix apart from the energy mix for a non-technical audience.
panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.approach: I used comparative charts and a narrative that separates the two mixes before crossing them.
panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.captionOne: Each energy source gets visual weight proportional to its role.
panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.captionTwo: Side-by-side comparisons make the differences immediate.
panorama-das-matrizes-eletrica-e-energet.websiteNote: The state's energy mixes explained with visual clarity.

testimonial.quote: It became easy to explain the difference between the mixes to any audience.
testimonial.author: Energy Unit

panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.title: Municipal Development Overview
panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.intro: A platform to compare development indicators across the municipalities of Alagoas.
panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.challenge: Letting people compare 102 municipalities without overloading the interface.
panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.approach: I combined a map, a ranking and a per-municipality profile, with filters that respond instantly.
panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.captionOne: The map gives the overview; the profile goes deep into each municipality.
panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.captionTwo: Rankings make comparisons immediate and fair.
panorama-de-desenvolvimento-dos-municipi.websiteNote: Municipal indicators made comparable through map, ranking and profile.

testimonial.quote: It became mandatory reading whenever municipalities are on the table.
testimonial.author: Research Unit

plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.title: Observatory Platform
plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.intro: The inner area of the Observatório da Indústria, where data stops being a PDF and becomes a living showcase.
plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.challenge: Balancing institutional restraint with a language that speaks technology.
plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.approach: A dark, blue-based interface in which charts and indicators are the leading characters.
plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.captionOne: Saturated colour is reserved for the data; the structure stays quiet.
plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.captionTwo: An editorial grid brings the reading closer to a publication.
plataforma-do-obervatorio-interna.websiteNote: The core of the Observatory: strategic data presented as a living showcase.

testimonial.quote: The platform gave the institution a data showcase worthy of what we produce.
testimonial.author: Executive Board

radar-tarifario-global.title: Global Tariff Radar
radar-tarifario-global.intro: A radar that tracks tariff changes around the world and what they mean for industry.
radar-tarifario-global.challenge: Turning a constant stream of tariff changes into something readable and current.
radar-tarifario-global.approach: I organised the content by country and sector, highlighting what changed and why.
radar-tarifario-global.captionOne: What changed comes first; the detail waits in the deep dive.
radar-tarifario-global.captionTwo: Country and sector filters leave every user with their own slice.
radar-tarifario-global.websiteNote: An always-current radar of the global tariffs that affect the productive sector.

testimonial.quote: Tracking tariffs became routine instead of a hunt for data.
testimonial.author: Foreign Trade Unit
